reasoning: The control 3_11_3 focuses on remediating vulnerabilities based on risk assessments. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that vulnerabilities in container images are scanned and remediated, which can be enforced using admission controllers. Additionally, ensuring that pods adhere to security standards and logging vulnerability remediation activities are crucial for compliance with this control.
title: 3_11_3: 3.11.3 Remediate vulnerabilities in accordance with risk assessments
